producer: QE 7.5 (conda qe env) pw.x+ph.x electron_phonon='interpolated' (nk=48^3) @ pool:ubu-1 (-np 4 nice +10 alongside li2cuh6) + harvest_v2.py (validity gate)
purpose: RTSC METHOD VALIDITY ablation per /gap full Tier-1 F2 — compare lambda_BZ + omega_log + Tc(mu=0.10) between electron_phonon='simple' (LANDED) and 'interpolated' (this) on identical h3cl 8x8x8q deck. Result determines whether every existing rtsc_*_elph_*.json record carries an unstated systematic (every record used 'simple').
system: H3Cl cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (1 Cl + 3 H = 4 atoms), ibrav=3, celldm=5.65934 bohr (a~2.995 A), PBE PSL 1.0.0 RRKJUS pseudopotentials. Same cell as LANDED rtsc_h3cl_dft_6x6x6q_novel_20260524.json (6q) and the 8q simple baseline at ~/rtsc_h3cl_8q/.

common.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry
common.phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 8x8x8 q (29 IBZ q-points)

simple_baseline.source: ph.x landed run at /home/aiden/rtsc_h3cl_8q/ (ubu-1) — JOB DONE marker present

interpolated_arm.nk_interpolation: 48x48x48 (8x denser than SCF for double-Fermi-surface average)
interpolated_arm.recover: false (Gamma q_1 dir absent; recover=true failed seqopn(99) on h3cl.recover)

interpolated_arm_table.status: PENDING — ph.x in flight on ubu-1 (PID 1781209-1781212 @ nice +10, -np 4)
interpolated_arm_table.estimated_completion: +1-3h from 2026-05-27T03:13Z (Band Structure Calc on 2769 kp grid in progress; elph step follows)
interpolated_arm_table.results: will be written on JOB DONE marker + harvest_v2 parse

ablation_gate_decision.rule_match_within_15pct: Tc_interp within ±15% of Tc_simple(=127.7K mu=0.10) → simple method vindicated family-wide
ablation_gate_decision.rule_caveat_15_to_25pct: Δ 15-25% → caveat banner on every existing rtsc_*_elph_*.json record
ablation_gate_decision.rule_break_gt_25pct: Δ >25% → N5 wall doc revision REQUIRED; demote h3cl Tier-2 wetlab handoff to provisional; re-run remaining candidates (labeh8 SSCHA-pending, h3o, h3se, h3te) with interpolated

honest_observations_pre_result: h3cl 8x8x8q simple gate VALID — fully stable phonons (min_freq +5.38 cm^-1, no imag).
Simple baseline σ=0.030 plateau center: λ_BZ=1.43, ω_log=1173 K, Tc(μ*=0.10)=128 K, Tc(μ*=0.13)=116 K.
Per /gap full F2 expectation: |Δλ| ~ 0.1-0.3, with interpolated typically delivering lower λ but better ω_log; net |ΔTc/Tc| family-mean ~5-15%.

Disk constraint on ubu-1 (99% full, 13 GB free) precludes a fresh independent workdir; ph.interp.in reuses dvscf perturbations + phsave dynmat markers in-place at /home/aiden/rtsc_h3cl_8q/, with simple-method elph.{q} files + phsave/elph.*.xml moved aside to /home/aiden/rtsc_h3cl_8q/_simple_backup/.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. Pattern 1 (R4 absorbed=true requires measured oracle) + Pattern 2 (no impossibility framing) preserved. Result table populates on JOB DONE.
